subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Husayn! Ponder thou upon the heedlessness of men. For a fleeting life of two days' span do they make provision [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسین در غفلت عباد تفکر نما از برای دو روزه عمر و زندگانی فراهم میآورند
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @goodly deeds; actions
